query:
INSERT INTO video_student_visibility
                    (video_id, student_id, visible, set_by_id, set_at)
                 VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
                 ON CONFLICT (video_id, student_id) DO UPDATE
                    SET visible = excluded.visible,
                        set_by_id = excluded.set_by_id,
                        set_at = excluded.set_at
